title: The Loose Cannon
identity: With an arsenal of custom guns, traps, and explosives, Jinx unleashes mayhem wherever she goes. She excels at zoning enemies, overwhelming them with colorful destruction from afar.
playstyle: Zoner. With an arsenal of custom guns, traps, and explosives, Jinx unleashes mayhem wherever she goes. She excels at zoning enemies, overwhelming them with colorful destruction from afar.
strengths: Chaotic keepaway and pressure identity with explosive tools.
Can make neutral uncomfortable through varied projectile threats.
Fits teams that want ranged disruption and high momentum swings.
weaknesses: Needs protection when opponents bypass her preferred range.
Exact defensive problem points need reviewed matchup footage.
partnerWants: Assist cover for explosive screen control
teamProvides: Chaotic keepaway and pressure identity with explosive tools.
Can make neutral uncomfortable through varied projectile threats.
learningPriorities: Practice projectile and weapon control at multiple ranges.
Learn confirms from explosive screen-control hits.
Review assist coverage that lets her safely reload pressure.
